name: cyp_family_architecture
description: Architectural record for the C. elegans cytochrome P450 superfamily. 79-86 cyp paralogs spread across 16 families (cyp-13, cyp-14, cyp-23, cyp-25, cyp-29, cyp-31, cyp-32, cyp-33, cyp-34, cyp-35, cyp-36, cyp-37, cyp-42, cyp-43, cyp-44, cyp-49) with the largest tandem clusters in cyp-13A, cyp-33C, cyp-34A, cyp-35A on chrV, chrII, chrI. Paralog identities range 65-98%; closely related copies in the same subfamily are PSV-disambiguation candidates.
